description:
OL 316 (REV. 2/2017)  WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
The Pony.ai autonomous vehicle ("Pony.ai AV") stopped at a red light on the corner of Harvard Ave and Barranca Parkway, preparing to 
make a right turn on red. The Pony.ai AV crept into the intersection before stopping to yield to oncoming traffic. While stopped, the Pony.ai 
AV was rear-ended by the vehicle behind it ("Vehicle 2"). The contact between the vehicles caused a moderate dent to the back of the 
Pony.ai AV and minor damage to Vehicle 2. Both drivers pulled over to the side of the roadway and exchanged information. There were no 
injuries reported and the police were not called. 
Go to Page 3
